text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
HmmmвҷӘ HmmmвҷӘ Hmm-hm-hmmmmпҪһпҪһпҪһвҷӘ 
вҖҰвҖҰAlright, all ready!

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
вҖҰвҖҰOh my. What happened? 
Where'd the usual sleepyhead go!?

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
EeheheпҪһ, Heart-chan, good mornin'пҪһвҳҶ 
Looking for a hug? An energy chargin' hug of loveвҷЎ

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
No way! Last time when you said гҖҺOka Sho was the worstпҪһ! Cheer 
me upпҪһ!гҖҸ you'd come beg me for hugs even during bath time.

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
вҖҰвҖҰYou said you were transferring to <Ascella> right? 
For now, do you think things will go well?

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
Of courseгғјгғјгғј! It's me after all? The geniusпҪһ? 
From here on, things'll just get better and better for sure!

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
(Right, this is where everything starts! 
From now on, it's a straight line to a sparkly future!)

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text: (Everything until now, wellвҖҰвҖҰsome things just happenedвҖ”вҖ”)

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
(No, no, but! In the beginning things were going 
so well, you know? I'm a genius after all! Since 
coming here, things have been going well!)

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
(That Selection Race was an easy 1st place, wasn't it? 
And someone came to scout me so quickly, right?)

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
(And there were so many amazing senpai, 
it was a great teamвҖ”вҖ”)

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ah, she's here! Pandora-chanпҪһ! 
Good work in the гҖҺFlower CгҖҸ earlier.

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
EeheheпҪһ, Bono-senpai, thanksпҪһвҳҶ 
And Mirako-senpai came to cheer me on right!? Thanks for thatвҷЎ

text_block_list.name: Hishi Miracle
text_block_list.text:
No, noпҪһ. 2nd place, you were so close, huh? 
вҖҰвҖҰAh, but still, getting 2nd in a Classic-grade 
major race is normally pretty amazing isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Miracle
text_block_list.text:
Wait, in your debut you finished 6 lengths ahead of 2nd 
place, and then went straight to a race that determines 
the Junior class Queen, the гҖҺHanshin JFгҖҸ. And got 3rd!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Miracle
text_block_list.text:
WellпҪһ, it took 10 races for me to win though, 
so I think it's an impressive recordпҪһ.

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text: EeheheпҪһ I see, see, see! As expected of me, I guessпҪһ!?

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
So far, 6 races with 2 wins, and I've only been off the 
scoreboard only once! Eh, awesome! No way! Just geniusпҪһвҷЎ

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
But still, after this, I'm just gonna keep on going! 
I'll become a legend! Just watch meпҪһвҳҶ

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Yep yep, we'll be looking forward to itвҷӘ 
Then, shall we get started with today's training!?

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
OkaaayпҪһвҷЎ вҖҰвҖҰAh, senpai, have you been to the store today? 
They had some new products that were reaaally lovelyвҖ”вҖ”

text_block_list.name: Team Trainer
text_block_list.text:
вҖҰвҖҰAlright, Pandora. Next up is finally the first leg of the Triple 
Tiara, the гҖҺOka ShoгҖҸ. We need to be more motivated than ever.

text_block_list.name: Team Trainer
text_block_list.text:
First, I'll show you the new training menu. Until we start making 
our final adjustments, we'll focus on high intensity trainingвҖ”вҖ”

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
No, no, no, Trainer, before thatпҪһ! In prep for such an 
important race, isn't there something else we need to do?

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text: The first thing! Is to raise our spiritsгғјгғјгғјвҳҶ

text_block_list.name: Team Trainer
text_block_list.text: вҖҰвҖҰвҖҰвҖҰHuh?

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
Ahahahahaa, c'mon everyone, over hereпҪһ!! 
Let's ride that one nextпҪһпҪһпҪһ!!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Wah wah, wait, waitпҪһ! 
But, Pandora-chan, is it okay for you to still be playing?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Starting tomorrow, you're training for the гҖҺOka ShoгҖҸ right? 
Won't you be a little tiredвҖҰвҖҰ?

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
I'm telling you it'll be fineвҳҶ 
C'mon, c'mon, Mirako-senpai too!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Miracle
text_block_list.text:
AhahaвҖҰвҖҰwell, if it's getting her motivated it's fineвҖҰвҖҰI guess? 
OkayпҪһ, I'm comingпҪһ.

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
No, that can't be fine. 
Geez, that PandoraвҖҰвҖҰ

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
That girl, she doesn't seem to be serious at allвҖҰвҖҰthis whooooole 
time she's been like that. Do you think she'll be okay?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! She's quite the unruly pony-chan isn't she? Even though 
Trainer-san tried so hard to stop her, she still insists on playing.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: That saidвҖ”вҖ”her potential really is something to look forward to.

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
Really! In the last team measurements, her times were 
really good weren't they? Compared to the average times 
for the Classic class in spring, she's a cut above.

text_block_list.name: Team Trainer
text_block_list.text:
вҖҰвҖҰBut that's exactly why this can't continue. 
Especially if she's aiming to win in Classic races.

text_block_list.name: Team Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Like thisвҖҰвҖҰwithout being hard-working and diligent, 
running by only relying on her talent, then most likelyвҖ”вҖ”

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
вҖ”вҖ”Well then Fusaichi Pandora-san, the гҖҺOka ShoгҖҸ is 
coming up soon! Could you tell us your thoughts?

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
OkaaaayвҷЎ My thoughts, huh? 
Well, that's of courseвҖ”вҖ”

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm a genius. 
It won't be just the гҖҺOka ShoгҖҸ that I winвҖ”вҖ”

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text: The "Triple Tiara" too! I plan to aim for that tooвҷЎ

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text: вҖ”вҖ”гҖҺThat's whyвҷЎгҖҸвҖ”вҖ”гҖҺThat's whyгҖҸвҖ”вҖ”гҖҺWhyгҖҸвҖ”вҖ”

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text: вҖҰвҖҰWhy?

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
вҖ”вҖ”The гҖҺOka ShoгҖҸ, the number 2 favorite, Fusaichi Pandora, 
takes a surprising 14th! The result is an utter defeatвҖҰвҖҰ!

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text: WhyyyyпҪһпҪһпҪһпҪһпҪһпҪһпҪһ!?

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
AaaahhпҪһпҪһпҪһ!! 
Are you seriousгғјгғјгғјгғјгғјгғј!?

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
(AhhпҪһgeez, I hate this, I hate it I hate it I hate it, this is 
the wooooorstвҖҰвҖҰ!! How did things turn out like thisпҪһвҖҰвҖҰ!?)

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
(Seriously, a blowout loss at the гҖҺOka ShoгҖҸ!? Even though I'm 
a genius! The tiaras, all of them were supposed to be mineпҪһвҖҰвҖҰ!)

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
(But, I went and said it!? To my senpais on the team, my classmates, 
and my parentsвҖҰвҖҰand at the press conference! In front of everyone!)

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
(I'll get the Triple TiaraпҪһвҖҰвҖҰ 
So, so, soвҖҰвҖҰembarrassingпҪһпҪһпҪһпҪһ!!)

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
вҖҰвҖҰAaaaahhгғјгғјгғјgeez!! 
I can't do this! I'm so doneгғјгғј

text_block_list.name: Hishi Miracle
text_block_list.text: Ah! There she is. Pandora-chanпҪһвҖҰвҖҰ!

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
Ah? вҖҰвҖҰHuh, senpai. What's wrong? 
And why are you still in your uniforms? It's training time isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
YouвҖҰвҖҰyou really haven't been checking our team's LANE, have you? 
C'mon, it doesn't matter what you're wearing so let's go.

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
Go where? вҖҰвҖҰWah, wait! 
W-what are you doingпҪһ!?

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text: Haaaa!? An гҖҺOka ShoгҖҸ review sessionпҪһпҪһпҪһ!?

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
вҖҰвҖҰwhat do you mean by "Haaaa!?". 
Of course we're going to do this.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Video was captured from so many angles and Trainer-san prepared a 
bunch of it, you knowпҪһ! Let's watch it together and talk about it.

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
No, no, no, a video!? From all angles!? 
It's all just about me getting crushed isn't it!?

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text: No way, no way! I don't wanna watch that againпҪһпҪһпҪһ!!

text_block_list.name: Team Trainer
text_block_list.text: Pandora!! вҖҰвҖҰJust listen, okay?

text_block_list.name: Team Trainer
text_block_list.text:
I regret that I wasn't able to guide you properlyвҖҰвҖҰ 
Though I suppose you could call this result гҖҺExpectedгҖҸ.

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text: вҖҰвҖҰвҖҰвҖҰHuh?

text_block_list.name: Team Trainer
text_block_list.text:
YouвҖҰвҖҰwhen it comes to training for the гҖҺOka ShoгҖҸ, you never once 
trained at full strength. You never once got serious, did you?

text_block_list.name: Team Trainer
text_block_list.text:
The Triple Tiara races aren't so easy that you 
can win like that. вҖҰвҖҰThat's why, let's reflect 
on that and work together for next time.

text_block_list.name: Team Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Coming to terms with your гҖҺOka ShoгҖҸ loss, and reviewing your running 
is an important first step. вҖҰвҖҰIt's okay, take a seat Pandora.

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text: вҖҰвҖҰвҖ”вҖ”

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text: вҖҰвҖҰвҖҰвҖҰNo way. I won't watch.

text_block_list.name: Team Trainer
text_block_list.text: WhaвҖ”вҖҰвҖҰwait, Pandora! Doing thatвҖ”вҖ”

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text: No way! No way no way no way no way, I can't!!

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
Not serious, not easy!? What's with that!? 
I don't know what you mean, no way no way no wayгғјгғјгғј!!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Miracle
text_block_list.text:
Wai- Pandora-chan!? Oh manпҪһпҪһпҪһвҖҰвҖҰ 
Um, wellвҖҰвҖҰit would be better to go after her, rightвҖҰвҖҰ?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
NoвҖҰвҖҰlet's wait a bit. If we were to go after her now, 
she'd probably just run away. вҖҰвҖҰWhat do you think, Trainer-san?

text_block_list.name: Team Trainer
text_block_list.text: вҖҰвҖҰThat's right. It seems like my words won't reach her.

text_block_list.name: Team Trainer
text_block_list.text:
I'llвҖ”вҖ”think things over. 
About what to do for her, and what's best for PandoraвҖ”вҖ”

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
Haa, haa. вҖҰвҖҰI don't get it. 
I don't understand, I hate this, ahhпҪһпҪһпҪһgeez!!

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text: DaaaaaпҪһпҪһпҪһпҪһ!!

text_block_list.name: Rhein Kraft
text_block_list.text: Ngyaa!!

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text: Whoa!?
